'''Deltooine''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was home to a [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] military base used to monitor [[Farana (region)/Legends|Farana]] and [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. It was part of the [[Tertiary Solenbaran]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]].

{{Planet-stub}}
